name: Backend Services Dashboard
description: Comprehensive backend monitoring dashboard with API and database performance

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM BackendApiRequest TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 95) FROM BackendApiRequest TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago

SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status LIKE 
\4%' OR status LIKE \5%') FROM BackendApiRequest TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM BackendDatabaseQuery TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 95) FROM BackendDatabaseQuery TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE result = \HIT') FROM BackendCacheOperation TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 2 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM BackendApiRequest FACET service SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM BackendDatabaseQuery FACET table SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM BackendServiceDependency FACET service, dependency SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT service, endpoint, average(duration), count(*) FROM BackendApiRequest SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT service, table, operation, average(duration), count(*) FROM BackendDatabaseQuery WHERE duration > 1.0 SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT histogram(duration, 10, 50) FROM BackendApiRequest FACET service SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT histogram(duration, 10, 50) FROM BackendDatabaseQuery FACET operation SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT service, percentage(count(*), WHERE result = \HIT'), count(*) FROM BackendCacheOperation FACET service SINCE 1 hour ago
